comment: F27 P9 T1f-c — acceptance floors gain HIGHEST-STAGE precision (the gate-meaningful metric under our highest-stage tagging). Measured 2026-05-18: macro precision_highest_stage 0.25, per-PR min 0.167. `corpus_precision_min` (validated-bucket) stays at 0.0 because that bucket is structurally empty when every Validator-accepted scenario also survives the Projector — kept for diagnostic surface but does not gate. The spec's nominal 80% recall / 90% precision is the destination; T2 prompt-tuning is the path. `enforcement: report_only` until T2 lifts the corpus above defensible thresholds.
